prompt: Create an IEEE-style campus network figure with core, distribution, and access layers in grayscale.
Create a research workflow figure for a paper showing data collection, preprocessing, modeling, validation, and reporting.
Create a paper-ready system architecture overview with client, API, worker, and storage layers.
Create an ablation-study figure comparing baseline and two variants before a shared evaluation block.
Create a cloud reference architecture using gateway, compute, async queue, and object storage.
Create a microservices architecture with API gateway, auth service, order service, event bus, and PostgreSQL.
Create a network topology with firewall, core switch, access switch, and wireless APs.
Create a horizontal tech-blue login flowchart with Start, Login Form, Validate, Success, and Error.
Create a dense architecture diagram with shared event flows, two databases, and cross-service dependencies.
Create a paper figure for a training pipeline including the loss formula $$L = -\sum y_i \log(\hat{y}_i)$$.
